raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Ghost guns are homemade guns made from parts that are readily available and unregulated.",
    "Ghost guns can be bought without a background check.",
    "The California Penal Code does not classify ghost guns as firearms.",
    "The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) has reported that 31% of guns recovered in California were unserialized, untraceable ghost guns.",
    "Localities such as Los Angeles reported that 41% of recovered guns were unserialized, untraceable ghost guns.",
    "More than 2,500 ghost guns were connected to criminal activity in 114 Federal cases from 2010 through April 2020.",
    "The presence of firearms in a situation of domestic violence significantly increases the risk of homicide.",
    "Ghost guns have quickly become the fastest growing issue in gun safety in California.",
    "Individuals prohibited from possessing purchased firearms should also be prohibited from possessing homemade firearms.",
    "Gun violence restraining orders (GVROs) are a powerful tool that can prevent mass shootings."
  ]
}
```
